description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a double garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped yard with trees and shrubs. Large windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear of the house opens to a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a barbecue area, bordered by more greenery. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with minimal decorative elements for a sleek, contemporary look. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch and a prominent front door.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, double garage, large windows, and a backyard deck with a pool. The exterior is light gray and white, with landscaped front and rear yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, paved driveway, landscaped yard, and main entryway with a small porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a portion of the backyard with visible trees and green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, lounge area, and large windows overlooking the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, barbecue area, and a partial view of the driveway and garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent front door, small porch, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and steps.
